title: MedOps HMS
description: How to use MedOps HMS, the hospital management platform: feature guides and role-based usage help for administrators, doctors, nurses, front-desk staff, and pharmacy teams.

pages.title: Admitted Patients (IPD)
pages.description: Admit patients to beds in MedOps HMS, record ward rounds and vitals, add inpatient medications, transfer between beds, and discharge.

pages.title: Appointments
pages.description: Book conflict-checked appointments in MedOps HMS against doctors' real availability, manage statuses, reschedule and cancel, and connect to consultations.

pages.title: Activity Log
pages.description: A complete, searchable record in MedOps HMS of who did what and when across your organisation.

pages.title: Billing & Payments
pages.description: How bills are generated in MedOps HMS, recording payments, tracking unpaid bills, and cancelling mistakes.

pages.title: Consultations
pages.description: Record a patient consultation in MedOps HMS — clinical notes and follow-up — and have the prescription and consultation bill created automatically on completion.

pages.title: Dashboard
pages.description: The MedOps HMS home screen — a role-aware starting point with quick access to your daily work, key numbers, and global search.

pages.title: Managing Doctors
pages.description: Add doctors to MedOps HMS, manage their profiles and credentials, set their consultation fee, and invite them by email.

pages.title: Hospitals & Departments
pages.description: Set up hospitals, departments, and the physical layout of floors, rooms and beds (with room pricing) that inpatient care relies on.

pages.title: Medicines Catalogue
pages.description: The shared, searchable medicines catalogue in MedOps HMS used across prescriptions and pharmacy stock.

pages.title: My Appointments & Availability
pages.description: For doctors — view your own appointment queue and set your weekly working hours, appointment slot length, leave and time-off in MedOps HMS.

pages.title: Operations Team
pages.description: Add and manage front-desk (Operations) staff in MedOps HMS, assign them to a hospital, and invite them by email.

pages.title: Patients
pages.description: Register patients in MedOps HMS, give each a unique Medical Record Number, search and update records, and view a full visit and prescription history.

pages.title: Pharmacies
pages.description: Set up pharmacies in MedOps HMS with their tax rates and manage who can sign in to each pharmacy's portal.

pages.title: Pharmacy Portal
pages.description: The pharmacy team's workspace in MedOps HMS — manage stock and prices, receive supplies, dispense against prescriptions, handle walk-in sales, and bill with tax.

pages.title: Prescriptions
pages.description: Clear, printable prescriptions in MedOps HMS with medicines, dosage, frequency and duration — created from a consultation and ready for the pharmacy.

pages.title: Your Account & Profile
pages.description: View and edit your MedOps HMS profile, change your password, and understand what you can and cannot change yourself.

pages.title: Signing In & The Basics
pages.description: How to sign in to MedOps HMS, set up your password for the first time, reset a forgotten password, and understand sessions and signing out.

pages.title: MedOps HMS — User Guide
pages.description: The user guide for MedOps HMS, the hospital management platform that brings patients, appointments, consultations, prescriptions, inpatient care, pharmacy and billing into one place.

pages.title: Overview
pages.description: What MedOps HMS is, who uses it, and how it is organised — one shared patient record across the front desk, doctors, wards, pharmacy and billing.

pages.title: Key Features
pages.description: A tour of everything MedOps HMS does — patients, appointments, consultations, prescriptions, inpatient care, pharmacy, billing, administration, search and activity logs.

pages.title: Roles at a Glance
pages.description: The six MedOps HMS roles — Tenant Admin, Doctor, Nurse, Staff, Operations and Pharmacy — and what each can do.

pages.title: FAQ
pages.description: Answers to common questions about using MedOps HMS.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.description: Plain-English definitions of the terms you'll meet in MedOps HMS.

pages.title: Doctor
pages.description: The Doctor guide for MedOps HMS — manage your appointment queue and availability, record consultations and prescriptions, and round on admitted patients.

pages.title: Nurse
pages.description: The Nurse guide for MedOps HMS — support inpatient care, view patient and ward information, and keep beds ready.

pages.title: Operations (Front Desk)
pages.description: The Operations guide for MedOps HMS — register patients, book appointments, admit and discharge inpatients, and take payments.

pages.title: Pharmacy
pages.description: The Pharmacy guide for MedOps HMS — manage stock, dispense against prescriptions, handle walk-in sales, and bill with tax.

pages.title: Staff
pages.description: The Staff guide for MedOps HMS — general hospital staff access to shared patient, ward and catalogue information.

pages.title: Tenant Admin
pages.description: The Tenant Admin guide for MedOps HMS — set up hospitals, departments, beds, staff and preferences, and oversee billing and activity across the organisation.

pages.title: First-Time Setup
pages.description: A step-by-step guide for the Tenant Admin to set up MedOps HMS for the first time — hospitals, wards, staff, pharmacy and preferences.

pages.title: An Inpatient Admission
pages.description: The end-to-end inpatient flow in MedOps HMS — admitting a patient to a bed, ward rounds and medications, transfers, and discharge.

pages.title: An Outpatient Visit
pages.description: The end-to-end outpatient flow in MedOps HMS — from registering a patient and booking an appointment to consultation, billing and dispensing.

pages.title: Pharmacy Dispensing
pages.description: The pharmacy flow in MedOps HMS — keeping stock current, dispensing against a prescription, handling walk-in sales, and billing with tax.
